title: US pushing Israeli de-escalation ahead of new Lebanon talks — May 17 negotiations
snippet: The US is pressing Israel to de-escalate military operations in southern Lebanon ahead of scheduled May 17 delegation-level negotiations in Washington. The talks will address security and political tracks including full Israeli withdrawal from southern Lebanon, borders, prisoners, displaced persons, and reconstruction. This pressure comes a day after Israel struck Beirut killing Hezbollah Radwan Force commander Malek Ballout.
tag_reason: New: US pressure on Israel for de-escalation and details of May 17 negotiation agenda not previously reported.
